tagline: News ranked by impact, not noise.

designSystem.style: Dark-first data-dense news dashboard with electric blue/cyan accent palette, impact score badges, color-coded urgency system (red critical → orange high → amber medium → green low), and card-based layout with left-edge urgency indicators

screens: Feed — Personal impact-ranked news feed with expandable cards, urgency badges, impact scores (0–100), consequence summaries, and category filters
Alerts — Live local disruption alerts (transit, weather, school, air quality) with severity color bars, countdown timers, and dismiss actions
Timeline — Accordion-style impact timelines showing how stories (transit strike, storm, tax deadlines) unfold step-by-step over hours and days
Actions — Prioritized actionable next steps panel with progress tracking, step-by-step guidance, and completion state
Profile — User settings with impact category preferences, notification toggles, calendar sync, light/dark theme switcher, and usage stats
